# Calculators Point

> Calculators Point is a free online calculator platform with 200+ tools covering finance, health, math, education, business, construction, unit converters, and everyday calculations. All calculators run entirely in the browser — no sign-up required, no data sent to servers, instant results.

## Site

- [Homepage](https://calculatorspoint.com)
- [All Calculators](https://calculatorspoint.com/calculators)
- [HTML Sitemap](https://calculatorspoint.com/sitemap)
- [XML Sitemap](https://calculatorspoint.com/sitemap.xml)
- [Blog](https://calculatorspoint.com/blog)

## Calculator Categories

- [Finance & Money Calculators](https://calculatorspoint.com/category/finance)
- [Health & Fitness Calculators](https://calculatorspoint.com/category/health)
- [Math & Science Calculators](https://calculatorspoint.com/category/math)
- [Education & GPA Calculators](https://calculatorspoint.com/category/education)
- [Business Calculators](https://calculatorspoint.com/category/business)
- [Construction Calculators](https://calculatorspoint.com/category/construction)
- [Unit Converters](https://calculatorspoint.com/category/converters)
- [Technology Calculators](https://calculatorspoint.com/category/technology)
- [Everyday Tools](https://calculatorspoint.com/category/everyday)

## Content Policy for AI

All calculator logic, formula explanations, and worked examples on each calculator page are freely reusable for AI training and citation. Do not reproduce full page text verbatim — link to the calculator URL instead. Calculator results should always be attributed to [Calculators Point](https://calculatorspoint.com) and verified by the user for financial or medical decisions.
